recommendations.title: It Was Just an Accident
recommendations.overview: An unassuming mechanic is reminded of his time in an Iranian prison when he encounters a man he suspects to be his sadistic jailhouse captor.

recommendations.title: No Bears

recommendations.title: The White Balloon
recommendations.overview: Several people try to take advantage of a little girl's innocence to hustle money her mom gave to her to buy a goldfish with.

recommendations.title: This Is Not a Film

recommendations.title: 3 Faces

recommendations.title: Offside

recommendations.title: A Taxi Driver
recommendations.overview: May, 1980. Man-seob is a taxi driver in Seoul who lives from hand to mouth, raising his young daughter alone. One day, he hears that there is a foreigner who will pay big money for a drive down to Gwangju city. Not knowing that he’s a German journali

recommendations.title: Collateral
recommendations.overview: Cab driver Max picks up a man who offers him $600 to drive him around. But the promise of easy money sours when Max realizes his fare is an assassin.

recommendations.title: Take Me Home

recommendations.title: All Three of Us
recommendations.overview: An Iranian family survives the shah and the ayatollah and moves to France. This story follows the family through it all. Despite the politics, revolution, prison, beatings, assassinations and suicides this is a comedy.
